title: scorzonera humilis subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Scorzonera humilis subsp. tenuifolia, also known as the slender scorzonera or small scorzonera, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer, and also exhibit health benefits like reducing blood sugar levels and improving digestion. Scorzonera humilis subsp. tenuifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible addition to traditional medicine.
